scripts.build-storybook: cd src/iotMapManager && npm i && npm run build && cd ../.. && npm i && storybook build -o ./docs && mkdirp docs/assets/img && cp src/iotMapManager/img/* docs/assets/img/
scripts.deploy-storybook: git add docs && git commit -m 'chore(storybook): deploy' --allow-empty && git subtree split --branch gh-pages --prefix docs && git push origin gh-pages -f && echo 'Storybook successfully deployed'
